metadata.name: MIDI Synths
metadata.description: MIDI CC implementation similarity across 324 synthesizers, drum machines, and effects units. Edges connect devices sharing ≥15 non-universal CC-to-section mappings.
metadata.credits: Data from midi.guide (Pencil Research) and community contributors.
